channel.title: Teaching on James Wade
channel.description: Recent content in Teaching on James Wade

item.title: A Beginning
item.description: I have an idea for lowering the barrier to learn new R packages. I have built a few private packages, but nothing of mine fits the bill for what I want to try. There are uncountable resources for getting started with R, and I do not have much to add there. If you defied the odds and found this before you found STAT 545, I highly recommend that course.

item.title: How to Teach
item.description: Much of my inspiration for this project come from Greg Wilson, founder of the Carpentries. These notes are based on his talks about how to teach tech. The first is a talk he gave in April 2019 for RStudio,1 and the second is an update to that talk from July 2021 on his personal YouTube channel.2 Lesson 1: Design Curriculum for Learning Stages There are three stages of learners: novices, competents, and experts.
